content.full_text:
June 25, 1990

Ms. Sandra Taylor  
Consultant  
Fair Political Practices Comsn.  
428 J Street, Ste. 600  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0814

Dear Ms. Taylor:

Re: Re-elect Councilwoman Joan Milke Flores Committee, I.D. #880059

Per our telephone conversation of June 18 1990, I would like to reconfirm the information you so kindly provided me relative to the following question:

We recently received a refund from the United States Treasury in the amount of $1,416.08 for a Permit Imprint #3936 (see attached copy) payable to the "re-elect Councilwoman Joan Milke Flores Committee".

This Committee was terminated and we wanted to know if we could deposit this refund in one of our two active controlled committees, the "Friends of Joan Milke Flores" or the "Californians for Joan Milke Flores" committees.

You indicated that since the Re-elect Councilwoman Joan Milke Flores Committee was terminated, we could deposit the refund in either of the two above mentioned committees.

In accordance with your instructions, we have deposited this refund on June 26 1990 in the "Californians for Joan Milke Flores Committee", I.D. #900273 and will report this deposit on our next campaign statement.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Yours very truly,

Diane D. Sallee  
Diane D. Sallee

Encl.
